overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt trail through a sunlit pine forest with large rock formations. The character encounters and passes a horse-drawn carriage on the winding path.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching large rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through a pine forest toward towering rock formations in the distance

entered.detail: dense evergreen pine trees lining the left side of the trail
dense evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the trail
massive tan-colored rock outcropping and cliffs ahead on the trail
worn dirt trail with grass edges winding through the forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit dirt trail through a dense pine forest. Tall evergreen trees frame both sides of the path while a massive rock formation looms ahead in the distance, creating a natural gateway.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail curving around rock outcroppings

events.description: character begins turning left to follow the curving path around the base of the rock formations

agents.ego_description: navigating the leftward curve of the trail around the massive rock walls, staying on the dirt path

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunk lying beside the trail among the grass

segments.scene_description: The trail curves left around the imposing rock formations, which shift from the center of view to the right side. The character follows the winding dirt path past a fallen log as the forest continues to flank both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with horse-drawn carriage passing

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two white horses appears ahead on the trail, moving toward the character
carriage passes by on the right side of the trail, moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as a horse-drawn carriage approaches from ahead and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses and a driver moving along the trail, passing the character on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the character continues through the forest, a horse-drawn carriage appears ahead and passes by on the right side of the trail. The carriage, pulled by two white horses, is the first traffic encountered on the otherwise empty forest path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest trail continuing through pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the forest, continuing the journey after the carriage has passed

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the winding dirt trail through the sunlit pine forest. The large rock formations have receded behind, leaving an open path ahead flanked by tall evergreen trees on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit forest trail that leads from a towering rock gateway into an open stretch of pine woods. It begins with the character walking toward a massive rock formation that looms ahead, framed by dense evergreen trees. As the trail curves left, the imposing rocks shift to the right side of the view, guiding the character past a fallen log along the winding dirt path. The scene then introduces a horse-drawn carriage pulled by two white horses, which passes by on the right as the character continues forward. Finally, the rock formations recede into the distance, leaving the character to walk an open, sun-drenched path flanked by tall pines.
